assumption: Current thesis model is steady fluid+walls.
caveat: Wall storage and transient heat capacity are future work unless reopened by a later row.
writer_instruction: Describe steady scope explicitly before writing transient implications.

assumption: Segment energy balance separates heater, cooler, wall loss, other, and residual lanes.
caveat: Residual is not a closure and should not be hidden in internal Nu.
writer_instruction: Use residual to motivate missing physics, not to admit a coefficient.

assumption: Wall/external heat loss can be represented as a resistance circuit.
caveat: Drive temperature and external boundary basis must be named; global passive hA sensitivity is not an admitted repair.
writer_instruction: Keep passive heat-loss explanation separate from fitting/admission language.

assumption: Radiation belongs in the external boundary network.
caveat: Realized CFD rcExternalTemperature/wallHeatFlux evidence must not be double-counted with a predictive radiation term.
writer_instruction: State setup-facing radiation inputs before predictive use.

assumption: Test section is the bare-quartz middle span of the upcomer.
caveat: It may be a net source or sink; it is not a removable cleanup heat leak.
writer_instruction: Preserve explicit source/loss lane in diagrams and tables.

assumption: Pressure model contains distributed friction and local-loss slots.
caveat: f_i and K_i are symbols until basis, isolation, split, and UQ gates pass.
writer_instruction: Use slot language unless a source package states admitted coefficient.

assumption: Upcomer evidence supports a throughflow plus recirculation-cell model lane.
caveat: Ordinary single-stream Nu, f_D, and K are invalid in recirculation-dominated rows.
writer_instruction: Use visual and metric evidence as diagnostic model-form support only.

assumption: Current lower-right two-tap pressure is section-effective residual evidence.
caveat: It is not ordinary component K, F6, clipped K, or hidden/global multiplier.
writer_instruction: Use negative result and model-form motivation wording.

assumption: Salt1-4 nominal rows are final training; support/holdout/external rows have restricted roles.
caveat: Split role cannot be overridden by good numerical agreement.
writer_instruction: Attach split role to every quantitative claim.
next_task_if_blocked: Candidate-specific release refresh only after gates pass.
